intro.title: We made something just for you, Aishwarya!
intro.subtitle: Solve each Wordle to unlock a farewell message from the team

puzzles.hint: What Aishwarya brings to every piece of content she writes.

message.text: Aishwarya, your attention to detail and the care you put into every word has made our product so much better. It's been a privilege to work alongside you — you've raised the bar for all of us. Wishing you all the best in your next adventure!

puzzles.hint: Every great product has one. Aishwarya made sure ours was told well.

message.text: You made the complex feel simple, and the simple feel delightful. Thank you for always pushing us to think about the user's perspective. Your stories will echo in this product long after you've moved on!

puzzles.hint: The quality of Aishwarya's writing — never a vague word in sight.

message.text: Working with you redefined what 'good writing' means to me. You could take a tangled spec and turn it into something a five-year-old could understand. That's a rare gift. Miss you already!

puzzles.hint: She gave our product one that felt human and warm.

message.text: Aishwarya, you've been the soul of our product's language. Every error message, every tooltip, every onboarding flow — you made them feel like they were written by a friend. That's your superpower. Go share it with the world!

puzzles.hint: Her tools of trade. She wields them like nobody else.

message.text: Few people understand that words are design. You always did. You brought rigour, warmth, and a brilliant eye for nuance to everything you touched. This team is better for having had you. Onwards!

puzzles.hint: How Aishwarya approached every tough feedback session and hard conversation.

message.text: You never shied away from saying 'I think we can do better here.' That courage made our work better every single time. Thank you for speaking up, pushing back with kindness, and always caring so much. You're a gem!

puzzles.hint: Her eye for inconsistency — she caught what everyone else missed.

message.text: Aishwarya, I lost count of how many times your feedback saved me from shipping something embarrassing. Your ability to spot the tiny things that matter most is genuinely remarkable. Thank you for your patience with all my copy blunders!

puzzles.hint: What she brought to every room, meeting, and Slack channel she was in.

message.text: Wherever you went, things just felt a little warmer and brighter. Your enthusiasm is contagious, your kindness is real, and your talent is undeniable. The next team that gets you is incredibly lucky. We'll miss you so much!

puzzles.hint: How she handled every deadline, pivot, and last-minute change.

message.text: I've seen you take a completely broken brief and turn it into something beautiful without a single complaint. Your grace under pressure is something I'll always admire and aspire to. Thank you for being such a wonderful teammate!

puzzles.hint: What we hope for Aishwarya in everything that comes next.

message.text: Aishwarya, this team has been lucky to witness your growth — and we know this is only the beginning. You're going to bloom wherever you go. Thank you for everything. We're rooting for you, always. 💜

finale.title: Until we meet again, Aishwarya!
finale.message: You've been so much more than a content designer to us. You've been a collaborator, a champion of clarity, a voice of reason, and a constant source of warmth. The work you've done here will live on in every word, every flow, every tiny interaction that makes our product feel human. Go do incredible things — we'll be cheering you on from here.
